name.value: ERPNext will make a stock ledger entry for each transaction of this item. Keep unchecked for non-stock or service items.

value.value: ERPNext will make a stock ledger entry for each transaction of this item. Keep unchecked for non-stock or service items.

name.value: Enable if this item is a company asset like machinery or furniture.

value.value: Enable if this item is a company asset like machinery or furniture.

name.value: Percentage by which over-delivery or over-receipt is allowed against a Sales/Purchase Order for this item. If not set, value from Stock Settings will be used.

value.value: Percentage by which over-delivery or over-receipt is allowed against a Sales/Purchase Order for this item. If not set, value from Stock Settings will be used.

name.value: Percentage by which over-billing is allowed against a Sales/Purchase Order for this item. If not set, value from Accounts Settings will be used.

value.value: Percentage by which over-billing is allowed against a Sales/Purchase Order for this item. If not set, value from Accounts Settings will be used.
